code:
mut c3 = 0
mut c5 = 0
mut i = 1
while i <= 15
  c3 = c3 + 1
  c5 = c5 + 1
  mut printed = false
  if c3 == 3 and c5 == 5
    print("FizzBuzz")
    c3 = 0
    c5 = 0
    printed = true
  else if c3 == 3
    print("Fizz")
    c3 = 0
    printed = true
  else if c5 == 5
    print("Buzz")
    c5 = 0
    printed = true
  end
  if not printed
    print("#{i}")
  end
  i = i + 1
end
